w:r.w:t: RankPulse is a production-grade Social Media SEO Intelligence Platform designed to help creators, brands, agencies, and social media managers maximize organic reach across Instagram, LinkedIn, and X (Twitter). The platform provides AI-powered content analysis, real-time SEO scoring, keyword research, competitor intelligence, hashtag strategy, and an automated optimization engine — all powered by the latest 2025-2026 platform algorithms.

Unlike generic scheduling tools, RankPulse is purpose-built for social SEO with platform-specific intelligence baked into every feature. The system is not vibe-coded — it is engineered around verified algorithm signals, open-sourced ranking code (X), official platform documentation (Instagram/Meta, LinkedIn Engineering Blog), and continuous research from industry leaders.
🎯 Mission: Give every creator and brand the unfair SEO advantage on social — free from guesswork.
📊 Target Users: Content creators, SMM agencies, B2B marketers, e-commerce brands, consultants.
🏆 Competitive Benchmarks: Semrush Social, Sprout Social, Metricool, Hootsuite, Later, Taplio.
💡 Core Differentiator: Platform-specific algorithm-aware SEO scoring — not just scheduling.
RankPulse becomes the definitive SEO layer for social media — the tool every serious creator and marketing team opens before they publish anything.
Provide platform-specific SEO scoring with real algorithm signals for Instagram, LinkedIn, and X.
Automate content optimization without replacing the creator's voice.
Surface competitor gaps and keyword opportunities in real-time.
Deliver actionable insights through a best-in-class analytics dashboard.
Ship a fully functional Admin Panel for platform management, user oversight, and billing.
Maintain zero technical debt from Day 1 — production-ready, accessible, and performant.
Solo content creator, 10K–500K followers, posts daily across 2–3 platforms.
Maximize reach without paying for ads.
Guesswork on what content will perform — no data feedback loop.
SMM agency, managing 10–50 client accounts across platforms.
Can't manually optimize every post for every client — need automation.
LinkedIn-first B2B SaaS marketer, focuses on thought leadership.
LinkedIn profile + content SEO for lead gen.
No tool gives them the LinkedIn Depth Score or keyword authority gap.
D2C/streetwear brand, heavy Instagram + X presence.
No visibility into whether their hashtags and captions are actually indexed.
Platform owner managing all users, tools, billing, and SEO engine config.
No visibility into platform health, user issues, or revenue without a dashboard.
SSR/SSG for SEO, type safety, performance.
Content analysis, SEO scoring, caption rewriting.
API-first architecture — all features callable via documented REST + GraphQL endpoints.
Modular SEO Engine — each platform (Instagram, LinkedIn, X) has an isolated scoring module.
Rate-limit aware — all social API calls go through a queue to respect platform quotas.
Zero-trust auth — JWT + Supabase RLS ensures users only access their own data.
Offline-capable dashboard — Service Worker caches analytics for 24h reading without network.
Accessibility-first — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance on all UI components.
5. Stitch MCP Server — Required Skills to Install
The following skills must be installed in your Antigravity IDE Stitch MCP server before development begins. These are prioritized for maximum build efficiency and to avoid quota burn.
Scaffold Next.js 14 app with TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and App Router in one command.
Generate Supabase migrations, RLS policies, and typed client from schema definitions.
Auto-generate typed Next.js API routes from OpenAPI spec or plain prompts.
Generate production React components with Tailwind, responsive, and accessible.
Supabase Auth integration — magic link, OAuth (Google), JWT middleware.
Complete Razorpay subscription billing with webhook handlers and plan management.
Generate admin + user dashboard layouts with sidebar, nav, and data tables.
Recharts/Chart.js wrappers — line, bar, donut, heatmap, radar charts.
Automate Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data across all pages.
Generate Vitest + Playwright test scaffolds for components and API routes.
Extract semantic keywords from user's content using TF-IDF + LLM scoring.
Flesch-Kincaid + platform-specific readability metrics for caption analysis.
Hashtag volume, competition, trend velocity — Instagram + X specific.
Public profile analysis via platform APIs — post frequency, top content, keyword gaps.
Detect duplicate/low-originality content that triggers platform penalties.
Tone scoring (positive/neutral/negative) aligned with each platform's preferred tone.
ML-based engagement rate prediction per platform based on content signals.
Analyze audience activity windows and recommend optimal posting times.
CRUD admin panel with user management, billing oversight, feature flags.
Resend.com integration — welcome, limit alerts, weekly SEO digest emails.
LaunchDarkly-style feature flags for gradual rollout without redeployment.
Sentry integration — frontend + API error capture with Slack alerts.
Vercel cron jobs for daily SEO re-scoring, digest emails, and data refreshes.

This section defines the exact parameters each platform's SEO scoring module must implement. All parameters are sourced from official platform disclosures, open-sourced algorithm code (X), and verified 2025-2026 research.
Instagram runs FOUR separate AI ranking systems. The scoring module must apply a different weight matrix to each surface:
Relationship strength, post recency, engagement velocity, carousel completion
Watch time (first 3s critical), DM sends, likes per reach, audio match
Recency, viewing history, close-friends overlap, reply frequency
Engagement velocity (first 60 min), content format, account authority score
Target 60%+ completion rate on Reels. Score drops sharply below 40%.
High-value signal — weighted 3–5x vs likes. Encourage 'send to a friend' content.
Ratio matters more than absolute count. Target > 3% for Reels.
Target 2–5% keyword density. Keywords must appear in first 125 chars.
Use 3–5 niche-specific hashtags. Penalized for > 10 hashtags or banned tags.
Hashtags are minor vs keyword SEO
Manual alt text on all images with natural keyword inclusion.
Bio keywords, link in bio, category set, story highlights active.
Min 4x/week to maintain AI topic cluster membership.
10+ reposts in 30 days → excluded from Recommendations (60–80% reach drop)
Watermarked videos (TikTok repost) → suppressed in Reels discovery
Engagement bait phrases detected by AI → distribution throttled
Rapid follow/unfollow patterns → account flagged, content suppressed
External link in caption → no direct penalty, but zero clickthrough from Explore
Duplicate audio/template reuse → originality score penalized

LinkedIn's algorithm is unique: it is explicitly designed to prevent virality and instead optimize for professional relevance. It uses a 3-stage pipeline: Quality Filter → Engagement Test → Network+Relevance Ranking.
KEY 2026 UPDATE: LinkedIn introduced the 'Depth Score' metric. It now tracks exact dwell time per post.
A user spending 45s reading without liking scores HIGHER than a 2-second like (indicates bot/pity behavior).
Educational content gets 3–5x more reach than other post types (Q1 2026 data, 10,000 post study).
External links in posts get significant reach penalties — use first comment strategy instead.
AI-generated content with generic language is now detectable and de-prioritized.
Long-form posts (1,200–2,000 chars) with strong hooks score highest. Use line breaks.
Profile headline must contain 3–5 buyer-intent keywords. Max 220 chars.
Substantive comments (> 5 words) from 1st-degree connections weighted 4x higher.
Engagement bait like 'Comment YES' now penalized
Consistent posting in 1–2 niches triggers 'topic cluster' expert classification.
Post 3–5x/week in same topic for expert tag
Complete profiles get 30% more views. All 7 sections filled = max score.
First 300 chars of About are indexed. Include 'Direct Answer Blocks' for AI referencing.
AI search surfaces structured bios first
Specific skills (not generic 'Leadership') endorsed by senior industry peers.
Transfers authority from endorser to profile
Post link in first comment, not post body. First comment gets 0% reach penalty.
Post body links suppressed by algorithm
First 60 min engagement is critical test window. Post Tue–Thu, 7–9am or 12–2pm.
'Like if you agree' / 'Comment YES' type engagement bait → immediate suppression
Low-effort AI-generated content (generic language, no specific details) → de-prioritized
Posting external links in post body → 40–60% reach reduction
Irregular posting (less than 2x/week) → topic authority classification reset
Overly promotional content (> 30% self-promotion ratio) → distribution throttled

X is the most transparent platform — its algorithm is open-source (GitHub: xai-org/x-algorithm, Jan 2026). The scoring module must implement the 3-stage pipeline: Candidate Sourcing (1,500 posts from 500M) → Grok-Powered Neural Ranking → Heuristics & Filtering.
CRITICAL 2026 CHANGE: Grok AI replaced the legacy recommendation system in Jan 2026. It now reads
every post and video (100M+/day) and ranks by predicted personal relevance — not just engagement counts.
TweepCred Score: Every account has a hidden 0–100 score. Below 65 = only 3 posts considered for distribution.
Premium accounts get +4 to +16 TweepCred boost — the pay-to-play gap is the largest of any platform.
CONFIRMED ENGAGEMENT WEIGHTS (open-source code): Likes × 1, Replies × 13.5, Retweets × 20,
Profile Clicks × 12, Link Clicks × 11, Bookmarks × 10. Author-reply to a reply = +75 (150x a like).
Author replies to replies = +75 weight. Single reply = +13.5. Highest leverage action.
150x more valuable than a like. Must auto-prompt.
Retweet = 20x a Like in score. Early momentum determines full distribution.
Account age, follower ratio, engagement quality, interactions with high-credibility users.
1–2 niche hashtags boost engagement 21%. Multiple hashtags penalized 40%.
Content indexed by Grok semantic clusters
Links in post body = 30–50% reach penalty. Zero median engagement for free accounts.
Post link in reply, not main tweet
Text-only posts outperform video by 30% on X. Native video > linked video.
Unique to X — text is king
Time decay: post loses ~50% visibility score every 6 hours.
Post at peak audience time, daily minimum
Premium subscribers get algorithmic multipliers (~10x reach per post vs free).
External links in post body → 30–50% reach reduction (recommend first-reply link strategy)
TweepCred below 65 → only 3 posts eligible for recommendation distribution
Spam patterns / follow-unfollow / bot interactions → TweepCred score reduction
Low originality / scraped content → Grok deprioritizes in semantic clusters
Primary conversion page. Hero with SEO score demo, feature grid, social proof, pricing CTA.
Hero, Feature Grid, Live SEO Score Demo, Testimonials, Pricing Preview, CTA
Deep-dive into all tools by platform with GIFs/screenshots.
Platform Tabs (IG/LI/X), Tool cards, Comparison table vs competitors
3-tier pricing with feature comparison table and Razorpay checkout.
Free / Pro / Agency tiers, Annual/Monthly toggle, Feature matrix, FAQ
SEO content marketing — algorithm guides, how-tos, case studies.
Featured posts, Category filters, Newsletter signup
Public product updates to build trust and reduce churn.
Contact form, FAQ accordion, Chat CTA
Email + Google OAuth, plan selection, onboarding questionnaire (platform focus, goals).
Email + Google OAuth, magic link option, remember device.
4-step wizard: platform connect → goal setting → competitor add → first SEO scan.
SEO score cards per platform, engagement trends, top performing posts, AI recommendations feed, posting time heatmap.
Paste any caption/post → AI scores against platform algorithm, shows penalty flags, keyword density, readability grade, predicted engagement range, rewrite suggestions.
Platform-specific keyword explorer: search volume proxy, trending keywords, keyword gap vs competitors, SERP snapshot (Instagram/LinkedIn search preview).
Hashtag builder: volume, trend velocity, competition score, banned tag detection, hashtag sets saved per content type.
Add up to 10 competitors. Track their top content, posting frequency, hashtag strategy, keyword themes. Shows gap analysis vs your account.
Calendar view. Each scheduled post runs through SEO checker before publish. Auto-suggests optimal time. Queue + draft management.
Per-platform profile scoring: bio keywords, profile completeness, link optimization, username SEO, call-to-action quality.
Impressions, reach, engagement, follower growth, SEO score trends. Custom date ranges. Exportable PDF/CSV reports.
AI generates 5 post ideas per day based on your niche, trending topics, and competitor gaps. Each idea pre-scored by SEO engine.
Profile, connected accounts, notifications, billing, API keys, plan upgrade.
Platform KPIs: total users, MAU, MRR, churn, top-used features, error rate, API quota usage.
List all users, search/filter by plan/activity, impersonate user, manual plan override, ban/suspend, view user activity log.
Razorpay subscription dashboard, MRR graph, failed payments, refund processing, coupon management.
Update algorithm weights per platform without code deploy. Feature-flag new scoring modules. A/B test scoring variants.
Flag review queue for any AI-generated content flagged by safety filters. Manual override panel.
Real-time status of Instagram, LinkedIn, X API rate limits, error rates, and quota consumption.
Toggle features on/off per user cohort (free/pro/agency) without redeployment.
Create and manage blog posts, changelog entries, and SEO meta for public pages.
Create and send transactional emails, digest newsletters, and platform announcements.
Full activity log: who did what, when. Admin action history with rollback options.

Design 04 — Neo-Brutalist — has been selected as the visual direction for RankPulse. This aesthetic communicates: raw intelligence, zero-nonsense precision, and unapologetic authority. The design system uses a bold yellow base (#FFFCE8), thick 2-3px black borders, red (#FF3B00) as the primary action color, and Bebas Neue + Space Grotesk typography. Every UI element is intentional — nothing decorative, everything functional.

This is not a generic SaaS dashboard. RankPulse looks different because it thinks differently. The neo-brutalist direction ensures it stands out in every screenshot, every product hunt launch, and every demo. It is built for creators and agencies who are serious about results.
Aesthetic: Raw grid, thick black borders, yellow (#FFFCE8) base, red (#FF3B00) accent — zero visual noise.
Typography: Bebas Neue (display headers) + Space Grotesk (body/UI) — bold, condensed, precise.
Unique Trait: Every element has a hard border and a clear job. No gradients, no shadows, no decorative filler.
UI Pattern: Newspaper-grid layout, thick dividers, platform scores in stark monochrome tiles.
Inspiration: Linear (density), The Verge (editorial grid), Stripe (data clarity), Notion (hierarchy).
Why it works: Stands out from every purple-gradient SaaS dashboard. Instantly memorable. Scales to mobile.
Production-grade component library — all states designed (hover, active, loading, empty, error).
Responsive: Desktop-first, with full Mobile + Tablet breakpoints.
Dark mode + Light mode toggle — both variants must be designed.
Platform-specific color coding: Instagram (pink/purple gradient), LinkedIn (blue), X (black/white).
SEO score visualization: Use consistent radial gauge or segmented bar component across all tools.
Micro-animations on score changes, hover states, and page transitions.
Icon system: Consistent icon library (Lucide or Phosphor Icons).
Set up Antigravity IDE + install all Stitch MCP skills from Section 5.
Scaffold Next.js 14 app with Supabase, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Auth.
Create Supabase schema: users, accounts, analyses, keywords, competitors, posts, plans.
Build public pages: Landing, Pricing, Blog, Auth pages.
Create 10 Stitch design concepts → present to stakeholder → select final design.
Implement design system: tokens, components, dark/light mode.
Build Instagram SEO Scoring Module (all 8 parameters + penalty detection).
Build LinkedIn SEO Scoring Module (all 9 parameters + Depth Score logic).
Build X SEO Scoring Module (all 8 parameters + TweepCred estimator + link penalty).
Content Analyzer UI — real-time scoring as user types caption.
Keyword Research module with semantic clustering.
Hashtag Intelligence module with ban detection.
Dashboard home with aggregated SEO health metrics.
Competitor Tracker — public profile analysis + gap matrix.
Post Scheduler with integrated SEO pre-check.
AI Content Suggestions via OpenAI/Claude API.
Admin Dashboard — all 10 admin pages (user management, billing, SEO config, etc.)
Razorpay subscription integration with webhook handlers.
Feature flag system with plan-based gating.
Email system: welcome, weekly digest, limit alerts.
Error monitoring, performance monitoring, Core Web Vitals audit.
Final QA, accessibility audit (WCAG 2.1 AA), security review, launch.
JWT + Supabase RLS, zero cross-user data access
Stored encrypted in Supabase Vault, never in env vars client-side
All public API endpoints rate-limited via Upstash Redis
WCAG 2.1 AA on all interactive components
Supabase connection pooling enabled. DB schema indexed on all query fields.
Cache all SEO analyses for 24h. Batch API calls. Use streaming for UX.
Data deletion on account close. No 3rd-party data resale.
To build this product efficiently without burning free-tier quotas, the following strategies must be enforced throughout development:
Use Stitch MCP to scaffold all boilerplate — zero manual CRUD, zero manual auth setup.
Build SEO scoring logic as pure TypeScript functions first — test without any API calls.
Mock all social platform API calls in development using seed data fixtures.
Use Supabase local development (supabase start) — never burn production quota in dev.
Cache all AI analysis results in Supabase for 24h — identical inputs never re-scored.
Use streaming responses for AI-powered rewrites to reduce TTFB and avoid timeouts.
Batch process scheduled post pre-checks — run all pending analyses in one cron job.
Implement aggressive client-side caching with React Query — staleTime: 30 min for keyword data.
Rate-limit user-facing AI calls by plan tier — free users get 15 analyses/month, pool the rest.
Use Vercel Edge Cache for all public page ISR — landing page cached for 1 hour.
Always use the most specific skill available — never ask for generic code when a skill exists.
Combine skills in single commands where possible: 'scaffold + auth + schema in one pass'.
Reuse generated components via the component library — never regenerate identical UI twice.
Use skills for design system tokens first, then generate all components from the same token set.
STEP 1 → Install all 23 Stitch MCP skills listed in Section 5 into Antigravity IDE.
STEP 2 → Open Stitch and generate 10 design concepts using the briefs in Section 8.2.
STEP 3 → Review designs with Kittu and select the final visual direction.
STEP 4 → Scaffold the Next.js + Supabase base app using the next-app-scaffold + auth-scaffold skills.
STEP 5 → Begin Phase 1 development per the roadmap in Section 10.
STEP 6 → Check back against this PRD at start of each phase — treat it as the source of truth.
